steps.title: The Spinner Wheel — powered by your audience
steps.description: The Spinner Wheel's standout feature: participants scan your QR code, enter their name to join, and the wheel fills itself with every participant automatically. No manual typing needed. Spin to pick a winner live. Click Next to see how.

steps.title: Create a new presentation
steps.description: Click 'New Presentation' to start a fresh deck.

steps.title: Pick the Spinner Wheel slide type
steps.description: Select 'Spinner Wheel' from the slide type picker. You'll find it in the Quiz section.

steps.title: Audience autofill — the star feature
steps.description: Check 'Participant name autofill' in the right panel. Participants scan your QR code and enter their name to join — the wheel fills itself with every participant's name automatically. Perfect for picking a random winner from a live crowd.

steps.title: Or add entries manually
steps.description: Prefer a fixed list? Type entries in the 'Entries' field — one per line — or paste a whole list from your clipboard. Up to 5,000 entries supported.

steps.title: Save your entries
steps.description: Click 'Save' — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.

steps.title: Adjust spin time
steps.description: Use the 'Spin time' setting to control how long the wheel spins before landing — up to 1,200 seconds for maximum suspense.

steps.title: Go live and spin the wheel!
steps.description: Hit 'Present' to go live — then press the button at the centre of the wheel to spin it. The chosen entry appears on every screen at once. The winner is in!
